title: Complexity Classes, Reductions, and Feasibility Boundaries · Invariant Triage
summary: Explain why a requested exact optimizer needs changed scope or a bounded alternative. Learners isolate plausible failures, compare competing hypotheses, and record cause-level repair evidence. Planned artifact: Repair a changed failure in a feasibility and reduction decision memo and publish the reproduction, evidence, repair, and regression record. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Translate optimization questions to decision form without losing the threshold meaning.
Describe polynomial verification and solution concepts without claiming unresolved equalities.
Map instances and answers through a polynomial reduction in the correct hardness direction.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
